openai.description: GPT-4.1 and GPT-5 family models tuned for fast SVG-friendly JSON output.

models.label: GPT-4.1 Nano
models.useCase: Fastest and most cost-efficient, good for simple animations.

models.label: GPT-4.1
models.useCase: Smartest non-reasoning model with 1M context window.

models.label: GPT-4o Mini
models.useCase: Legacy model, still available for existing workflows.

models.label: O1
models.useCase: Advanced reasoning model for complex problem solving.

models.label: O3 Mini
models.useCase: Smaller reasoning model, good balance of speed and capability.

models.label: GPT-5.2
models.useCase: Latest flagship model with peak intelligence.

anthropic.description: Claude 4.x family models excel at structured SVG-aware instructions and reasoning.

models.label: Claude Sonnet 4.5
models.useCase: Highly capable Sonnet model with excellent reasoning.

models.label: Claude 3 Haiku
models.useCase: Legacy fast model, optimized for speed.

google.description: Gemini 2.5 and 3.x models optimized for creative SVG prompting and fast generation.
